ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Deployment to Production Completed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a quick update on the Jira ticket #12345 that was opened last week regarding the bug in the payment gateway integration.

After thorough testing in the staging environment, the issue has been fixed and the patch has been merged into the main branch. I have also created a pull request in GitHub (PR #9876) which correlates with this Jira ticket.

Deployment to production is scheduled for tomorrow at 02:00 AM IST. Please ensure that the deployment window is clear and that the rollback plan is ready just in case.

Thanks for the prompt support and for prioritizing this fix.

Best,
Anjali Sharma
DevOps Lead

---

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Overdue – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We regret to inform you that your QuickBooks account has an outstanding invoice that remains unpaid for over 60 days. As per our records, the amount due is ₹75,000.00 and the invoice number is QB-INV-2026-08.

If payment is not received within the next 48 hours, your account will be suspended and all your documents will be locked. This action is in compliance with QuickBooks' Terms of Service.

To avoid any disruption, please log into your QuickBooks account and complete the payment by clicking the link below:

<URL>

If you believe this is an error, or if you have already made the payment, please contact our support team immediately at support@quickbooks.com or call +91-80-9876-5432.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Regards,
QuickBooks Billing Department

---

QuickBooks
